name: Aetna Better Health of Kentucky
description: Aetna Better Health of Kentucky is a CVS Health Medicaid managed care plan serving Kentucky Medicaid members across all 120 counties. The plan covers the full ASAM continuum for substance use disorder treatment and provides integrated behavioral health services for members with co-occurring mental health conditions.
coverageHighlights: Residential SUD treatment (ASAM 3.1, 3.3, 3.5) based on medical-necessity review
Outpatient SUD counseling and relapse-prevention programming
Medication-Assisted Treatment — Suboxone, Subutex, methadone, Vivitrol, oral naltrexone
Integrated care for depression, anxiety, PTSD, and bipolar when co-occurring with SUD
Care management for members with high-acuity or repeat-admission SUD
Pharmacy benefit through CVS Caremark for MAT and associated medications
priorAuthNotes: Aetna Better Health of Kentucky uses ASAM criteria for medical-necessity determinations. Residential SUD admissions typically require prior authorization with concurrent review; PHP/IOP may be handled through notification.
memberBenefitsNote: Aetna Better Health members have access to 24/7 nurse advice, care-coordination support for complex behavioral-health cases, and transportation benefits through MTM for SUD appointments.
